use_cases: Visualizing time-series data with stacked layers showing proportional changes over time
Displaying categorical data distributions in a flowing, organic stream format
Representing multi-series trends where layer overlap creates a cumulative view
ai_summary: Airbnb's streamgraph visualization component renders layered data streams using VisX shapes and patterns. The component uses @visx/shape Stack for the stream layout, PatternCircles and PatternWaves for fill textures, and @react-spring/web for smooth animations. Features 20 layers with 200 samples each, using a curated color palette (#ffc409, #f14702, #262d97, #036ecd, #9ecadd, #51666e) on a warm pink background (#ffdede). Supports press-to-refresh interaction to regenerate random bump data.
